diagnostic: Technical debt is the compound interest of deferred decisions. Every year it is not addressed, it costs more to service. A spec-driven boardroom prevents debt at the source by enforcing structured decision-making.
answer: Technical debt is the compound interest of deferred decisions. Every year it is not addressed, it costs more to service. A spec-driven boardroom prevents debt at the source by enforcing structured decision-making.
description: R&D stagnation — the 'Maintenance Tax' eats the Innovation Budget. Engineers spend 80% on refactoring the refactor.
symptom: R&D budget grows, feature release cycle slows. $20M Series B spent on keeping the lights on.
